title: ACDP Transparency-Log Leaf (0.3.0)
description: One transparency-log leaf: the closed object binding one accepted publish event (RFC-ACDP-0012 §4). The leaf encoding — the bytes that are hashed — is the JCS canonicalization (RFC 8785) of this object; leaf_hash = SHA-256(0x00 || JCS(leaf)) per RFC-ACDP-0012 §5.1. Specified by RFC-ACDP-0012 (acdp/0.3.0), promoting the RFC-ACDP-0009 §2.11 reservation; additive minor, so this schema lives in the v0.1.0 namespace (VERSIONING.md).

leaf_version.description: Leaf envelope version and in-object domain separator (RFC-ACDP-0012 §4): a leaf can never be mistaken for an RFC-ACDP-0010 receipt preimage or any other JCS-canonicalized ACDP object.

ctx_id.description: The registry-assigned context identifier (RFC-ACDP-0001 §5.5). Exactly one leaf per ctx_id.

origin_registry.description: The registry-assigned origin authority (bare DNS hostname, RFC-ACDP-0002 §3.1). MUST equal the ctx_id authority and the log's registry DID authority.

created_at.description: The registry-assigned creation timestamp, canonical millisecond-precision RFC 3339 UTC (RFC-ACDP-0001 §5.3). Byte-identical to body.created_at and registry_receipt.created_at.

content_hash.description: The body's content_hash as verified at publish time (RFC-ACDP-0001 §5.7).

key_fingerprint.description: The RFC-ACDP-0010 §6 fingerprint of the producer key resolved at publish time. MUST equal registry_receipt.key_fingerprint.

receipt_hash.description: The RFC-ACDP-0010 §2 receipt hash of this context's registry receipt (over the receipt preimage, i.e. minus 'signature') — binding the signed receipt statement while remaining stable across the sanctioned post-compromise re-mint (RFC-ACDP-0012 §4).

$comment: Closed schema: the leaf bytes are hashed into the tree, so an unknown member would change the leaf hash. Extensions require a leaf_version bump (RFC-ACDP-0012 §4).
